Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
268 
TOOTH_ORAL_CVTY_AREA_DSGNTD_CD 
LABEL: 
Tooth Oral Cavity Area Designated Code 
DESCRIPTION: The area of the oral cavity on which the service was performed. 
SHORT NAME: TOOTH_ORAL_CVTY_AREA_DSGNTD_CD 
LONG NAME: TOOTH_ORAL_CVTY_AREA_DSGNTD_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
OT line 
VALUES: 
00 = Entire Oral Cavity 
01 = Maxillary
